subject: Fwd: Follow up - D.B. Zwirn redemption issues - Privileged and Confidential

body_html:
Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "Barbieri, Dominick D." <dominick.barbieri@dpw.com>
Date: April 24, 2008 11:29:25 AM EDT
To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>
Subject: RE: Follow up - D.B. Zwirn redemption issues - Privileged and Confidential

Darren,
 
    My apologies for any delay.  I am checking in with Mike regarding status.  I will follow up as soon as I hear something.  In the mean time, please feel free to call or email.
 
    Thank you,
    Dom
 
Dominick D. Barbieri
Davis Polk & Wardwell
450 Lexington Ave.
New York, NY 10017
212.450.4698
212.450.3698 (facsimile)
 
 
Confidentiality Note: This e-mail is intended only for the person or entity to which it is addressed and may contain information that is privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. Dissemination, distribution or copying of this e-mail or the information herein by anyone other than the intended recipient, or an employee or agent responsible for delivering the message to the intended recipient, is prohibited. If you have received this e-mail in error, please notify the sender immediately and destroy the original message and all copies.
 

From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com]
Sent: Thursday, April 24, 2008 11:16 AM
To: Barbieri, Dominick D.
Cc: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Subject: Re: Follow up - D.B. Zwirn redemption issues - Privileged and Confidential

Dom,
 
You promised to send me your plan by yesterday.  I have not received it.  Mr. Epstein wants to move forward with this immediately and I have nothing from you to report to him. 
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
